contentHtml:
Races

  • NEW:
    • Sylph, a wind aligned fae subrace.
  • Phoenix rebirth now removes all buffs/debuffs.
  • Slime Body mana cost reduced from 1→0.
  • Fading Counter mana cost reduced from 1→0.
  • Blinding Dust now has the circuit keyword.
  • Faerie Flash II slightly updated to account for abilities potentially resetting Faerie Flash.

Classes

  • NEW:
    • Medic, a tier 1 healer class that does not use mana to heal
    • Naturalist, a tier 2 healer class that uses a healing over time effect.
    • Cannoneer, a tier 2 striker class that uses a cannon.
    • Aerial Mage, a tier 2 specialist class that rides an aerial staff
    • Fae Knight, a tier 2 striker class that uses floating swords to attack
    • Fae Knight Willow Style, a tier 3 striker/defender class that builds off fae knight.
  • Armorsmith
    • Share Armor now also includes the user's shields for the bonus.
  • Assassin
    • Clarified key ability.
  • Colossus
    • Clarified requirements on some abilities.
  • Exalted Shield
    • Aura of Resistance now replaces the target's toughness value with your own toughness instead of simply adding it on top.
  • Highlander
    • Meteor Cleave now specifies it's with melee weapons. Movement with it is now up 10ft instead of forcing the movement.
  • Hydromancer
    • Added the water tag to all abilities.
  • Magitechnician
    • Key ability now gives you +1 Burden to use on artifices.
  • Necromancer
    • Raise Undead now has Spell and Safe keyword.
  • Necromaster
    • Raise Undead II now has Spell and Safe keyword.
  • Ninja
    • Bunshin Tai now treats clones as just you.
    • Kawarimi no Jutsu hiding updated to no longer be basic Hide action.
  • Jonin
    • En-dama hiding updated to no longer be basic Hide action.
  • Peltast
    • Key ability changed.
  • Pyromaster
    • Hellfire updated.
  • Rogue
    • Proficiencies clarified.
  • Shadow Thief
    • Vanish hiding updated to no longer be basic Hide action.
  • Shield Paladin
    • Aura of Protection now costs 1 AP to activate.
  • Summoner
    • Pipoltr now specifies it requires an EP of gardening work before resummoning.

Item

  • Artificing:
    • Artificing reworked slightly to standardize it with other crafting classes.
    • Use of better materials made cheaper.
      • Better materials now let you add more C mods to the artifice.
    • Added some mods to most artifices that were missing some.
    • Some prices reduced.
  • NEW:
    • Cannon, a new weapon.
    • Elemental Grease, a consumable that changes the damage type of a weapon for 1 encounter.
    • Eagle Potion, a consumable that mimics status assessment.
    • Shell Converter, an artifice for easier creation of shells during rests.
  • Refractory Plates armor A mod price increased.
  • Thrown weapons now have the boomerang effect by default.
    • Boomerang A mod replaced with skirmisher.
  • Added some gauntlet mods.
  • Shield material bonus and block cloak block increased from +2 per tier to +3 per tier.
  • Binoculars now also reduce your perception vs things closeby.

Keywords

  • NEW:
    • Regrowth
    • Hellfire is now a keyword.
    • Opportunistic, added it to some abilities.
  • Upkeep can no longer be paid while downed.
  • Safe wording updated to apply to spells too.
  • Sanctify can now be chosen to not be consumed when the attacker is already at full HP.
  • Added Augment to a bunch of things.
contentText:
Races

- NEW:- Sylph, a wind aligned fae subrace.

- Phoenix rebirth now removes all buffs/debuffs.
- Slime Body mana cost reduced from 1→0.
- Fading Counter mana cost reduced from 1→0.
- Blinding Dust now has the circuit keyword.
- Faerie Flash II slightly updated to account for abilities potentially resetting Faerie Flash.
Classes

- NEW:- Medic, a tier 1 healer class that does not use mana to heal
- Naturalist, a tier 2 healer class that uses a healing over time effect.
- Cannoneer, a tier 2 striker class that uses a cannon.
- Aerial Mage, a tier 2 specialist class that rides an aerial staff
- Fae Knight, a tier 2 striker class that uses floating swords to attack
- Fae Knight Willow Style, a tier 3 striker/defender class that builds off fae knight.

- Armorsmith- Share Armor now also includes the user's shields for the bonus.

- Assassin- Clarified key ability.

- Colossus- Clarified requirements on some abilities.

- Exalted Shield- Aura of Resistance now replaces the target's toughness value with your own toughness instead of simply adding it on top.

- Highlander- Meteor Cleave now specifies it's with melee weapons. Movement with it is now up 10ft instead of forcing the movement.

- Hydromancer- Added the water tag to all abilities.

- Magitechnician- Key ability now gives you +1 Burden to use on artifices.

- Necromancer- Raise Undead now has Spell and Safe keyword.

- Necromaster- Raise Undead II now has Spell and Safe keyword.

- Ninja- Bunshin Tai now treats clones as just you.
- Kawarimi no Jutsu hiding updated to no longer be basic Hide action.

- Jonin- En-dama hiding updated to no longer be basic Hide action.

- Peltast- Key ability changed.

- Pyromaster- Hellfire updated.

- Rogue- Proficiencies clarified.

- Shadow Thief- Vanish hiding updated to no longer be basic Hide action.

- Shield Paladin- Aura of Protection now costs 1 AP to activate.

- Summoner- Pipoltr now specifies it requires an EP of gardening work before resummoning.

Item

- Artificing:- Artificing reworked slightly to standardize it with other crafting classes.
- Use of better materials made cheaper.- Better materials now let you add more C mods to the artifice.

- Added some mods to most artifices that were missing some.
- Some prices reduced.

- NEW:- Cannon, a new weapon.
- Elemental Grease, a consumable that changes the damage type of a weapon for 1 encounter.
- Eagle Potion, a consumable that mimics status assessment.
- Shell Converter, an artifice for easier creation of shells during rests.

- Refractory Plates armor A mod price increased.
- Thrown weapons now have the boomerang effect by default.- Boomerang A mod replaced with skirmisher.

- Added some gauntlet mods.
- Shield material bonus and block cloak block increased from +2 per tier to +3 per tier.
- Binoculars now also reduce your perception vs things closeby.
Keywords

- NEW:- Regrowth
- Hellfire is now a keyword.
- Opportunistic, added it to some abilities.

- Upkeep can no longer be paid while downed.
- Safe wording updated to apply to spells too.
- Sanctify can now be chosen to not be consumed when the attacker is already at full HP.
- Added Augment to a bunch of things.
